detaileddescription.para: Defines the prefix for MLFacialExpressionResult codes.
Unable to detect the eyes, check MLHeadsetFitStatus.
Operation failed because enable_eye_expression in MLFacialExpressionSettings is disabled.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Lower Lid upward movement of the left eye.
Lower Lid upward movement of the right eye.
Upper lid upward movement of the left eye.
Upper lid upward movement of the right eye.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: A structure containing information about facial expressions. This structure must be initialized by calling MLFacialExpressionEyeDataInit before use.
A structure containing settings for the facial expressions. This structure must be initialized by calling MLFacialExpressionSettingsInit before use.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.
The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Returns an ASCII string for MLFacialExpressionResult and MLResult codes.

parameterdescription.para: The input MLResult enum from MLFacialExpression functions.

simplesect.para: ASCII string containing readable version of result code.

briefdescription.para: Creates a Facial expression client handle.

detaileddescription.para: Although multiple client handles can be created they all represent the same facial expressions backend system.

parameterdescription.para: Settings that configures the facial expressions system.
The handle to be created.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
Facial expression client was created successfully.
Perception System has not been started.
Necessary permission is missing.
Operation failed for unknown reason.

briefdescription.para: Update the Facial expression system with new settings.

parameterdescription.para: Facial expression client handle created by MLFacialExpressionCreateClient.
New Facial expression settings.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
Facial expression settings was updated successfully.
Perception System has not been started.
Operation failed for unknown reason.
Facial expression client handle created by MLFacialExpressionCreateClient.
Eye expressions data.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
Facial expression data was retrieved successfully.
Perception System has not been started.
Operation failed for unknown reason.
Operation failed because unable to detect the eyes, check MLHeadsetFitStatus.

briefdescription.para: Destroy client handle and free client resources.

parameterdescription.para: Facial expression client handle created by MLFacialExpressionCreateClient.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
Client handle was successfully destroyed.
Perception System has not been started.
Operation failed for unknown reason.
